mapper.select: SELECT t.*, b.display_name AS bgm_display_name, b.file_path AS bgm_file_path FROM timer_setting t LEFT JOIN bgm_file b ON t.bgm_file_id = b.id WHERE t.tournament_id = #{tournamentId} AND t.round_number = #{roundNumber} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO timer_setting (tournament_id, round_number, duration_minutes, bgm_file_id, bg_image_path, updated_at) VALUES (#{tournamentId}, #{roundNumber}, #{durationMinutes}, #{bgmFileId}, #{bgImagePath}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, bgm_file_id = #{bgmFileId}, bg_image_path = #{bgImagePath}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bgm_file ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bgm_file (display_name, file_path, file_size, is_builtin, uploaded_at) VALUES (#{displayName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{isBuiltin}, NOW())
